title: Fix Authentication Token Expiry Bug
description: Users are being logged out prematurely. The JWT token expiry is not being handled correctly on the frontend. Investigate the auth flow and implement a fix that properly handles token refresh.
requirements: Identify the root cause of premature logout
Add proper error handling for expired tokens
Write a brief summary of the fix
client_context:
Subject: Urgent - Users getting logged out

Hi Team,

We've had 15+ support tickets in the last 2 days about users being randomly logged out of the dashboard. This is affecting our retention metrics. Can you please look into this ASAP?

- Rohan (Client)
expected_deliverable: Code fix with token refresh logic + summary of changes

title: Design User Profile API Endpoint
description: Create a RESTful API endpoint that allows users to view and update their profile information. Include proper validation, error handling, and authorization checks.
requirements: Authorization check (user can only edit own profile)
client_context:
Subject: Profile Management Feature

We need the profile management feature for the upcoming release. Users should be able to view and edit their name, email, and profile picture. Nothing too complex, but it should be secure.

- Sarah (Product Manager)
expected_deliverable: Node.js/Express route handlers with validation middleware

title: Implement Data Table with Sorting & Filtering
description: Build a reusable React data table component that supports sorting by columns, filtering by text input, and pagination. The data should be fetched from an API endpoint.
client_context:
Subject: Dashboard Data Table

Hey, the admin dashboard needs a proper data table to display user analytics. We need sorting, searching, and pagination. Check out the figma mockup attached.

- Priya (Team Lead)
expected_deliverable: React component with sorting, filtering, and pagination

title: Write API Integration Tests
description: Write comprehensive integration tests for the user authentication endpoints (login, register, logout, refresh token). Use Jest and Supertest.
client_context:
Subject: Test Coverage Requirements

Our CI pipeline now requires minimum 80% test coverage. The auth module is currently at 30%. Please bring it up to spec.

- DevOps Team
expected_deliverable: Integration test file with Jest + Supertest

title: Create Email Notification Service
description: Build a microservice that sends transactional emails (welcome email, password reset, notification). Use a queue system to handle async email sending.
client_context:
Subject: Email Service Integration

We're launching next month and still don't have automated emails. New users aren't getting welcome emails. This is a blocker for launch.

- Sneha (HR)
expected_deliverable: Email service module with queue processing

title: Optimize MongoDB Query Performance
description: The analytics dashboard is loading slowly (>5 seconds). Analyze the existing MongoDB queries, identify bottlenecks, and optimize them with proper indexing and query restructuring.
requirements: Profile slow queries using MongoDB explain()
client_context:
Subject: Dashboard Performance Issues

The analytics page is taking forever to load. Clients are complaining. We need this fixed before the demo on Friday.

- Rohan (Client)
expected_deliverable: Optimized queries + index definitions + performance report

title: Build File Upload Component
description: Create a drag-and-drop file upload component in React with preview support for images, progress bar, and error handling. Files should be uploaded to cloud storage via a presigned URL flow.
requirements: Error handling (file too large, wrong type)
client_context:
Subject: File Upload Feature

Users need to be able to upload their profile pictures and documents. Make sure it supports images (jpg, png) and PDFs. Max file size: 5MB.

- Sarah (Product Manager)
expected_deliverable: React upload component + backend upload handler

title: Prepare Weekly Progress Report
description: Summarize the week's development progress, including tasks completed, blockers encountered, and planned work for next week. Format as a professional email to the team lead.
requirements: List completed tasks with brief descriptions
client_context:
Team standup reminder: Weekly progress report due every Friday EOD.

- Priya (Team Lead)

title: Implement Rate Limiting Middleware
description: Add rate limiting to the API to prevent abuse. Different rate limits should apply to different endpoints (stricter for auth endpoints, more lenient for read-only endpoints).
requirements: Proper HTTP 429 responses with Retry-After header
Optional: use Redis for distributed rate limiting
client_context:
Subject: Security Audit Findings

The security audit flagged that our API has no rate limiting. This is a high-priority fix. Please implement before the next deployment.

- Security Team

title: Design Sprint Retrospective Notes
description: You just completed a 2-week sprint. Write a retrospective document covering what went well, what could be improved, and action items for the next sprint.
requirements: Summary of sprint goals and outcomes
What could be improved (at least 3 points)
client_context:
Sprint retrospective is scheduled for 3 PM. Come prepared with your thoughts on the sprint.

- Priya (Team Lead)
